name: lister
description: Simple, fast, efficient, opinionated list management for agentic AI

functions.name: listTypes
functions.description: List supported opinionated list types with purpose and fields

functions.name: create
functions.description: Create a list with optional type and description

functions.name: lists
functions.description: List all known lists with name, list_type, and description

functions.name: add
functions.description: Add an item to a list using JSON object with optional positional id insert

functions.name: remove
functions.description: Delete an item by positional id from a specific list

functions.name: update
functions.description: Update an item by positional id in a specific list

functions.name: clear
functions.description: Clear all items in a list

functions.name: status
functions.description: Return the lister-store path, whether it exists, and aggregate list and item counts
